name: Gravity-Room Freight
description: Rotate an entire chamber and let a physical freight capsule settle through three ordered airlocks into its dock.
natural_language: Quarter-turn the room and route the capsule through all three numbered airlocks before the final dock.

metadata.notes: New Interaction VII–VIII candidate. The browser renders the generated physical state and records only ordinary pointer/keyboard control events; the live server and exported verifier independently replay the mechanic-specific geometry or dynamics.
